---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. (e.g., "I'm frustrated when...")

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Use Case

Explain your specific use case. How would you use this feature?

**Example:**
```yaml
# Show example configuration or usage
data:
  my_field:
    datatype: new_type[params]
```

## Alternatives Considered

What alternative solutions or features have you considered?

## Additional Context

- Does this feature exist in similar tools? (e.g., Mockaroo, Faker, other data generators)
- Would this be a breaking change?
- Are you willing to contribute a PR for this feature?

## Acceptance Criteria

What conditions must be met for this feature to be considered complete?

- [ ] Functionality works as described
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Tests added
- [ ] No performance regression
